channel.title: jb-marketplace-plugins-jetbrains
channel.description: The latest JetBrains plugins on the JetBrains marketplace
channel.dc:creator: Jonathan Lermitage

item.title: Compose Code Locator - Wed Jul 01 09:24:23 UTC 2026
item.description:
Compose Code Locator provides Android Studio screenshot-to-source navigation for Jetpack Compose debug builds.
vendor: nianzixin downloads: 1 pricingModel: FREE xmlId: io.github.nianzixin.compose-code-locator

item.title: MilkJ - Mon Jun 29 21:13:16 UTC 2026
item.description:
